character: Lily-Rose Depp likeness from approved L'Eau 2016 still — private interview research only

shared_rules.product: Unlabeled faceted crystal bottle — no N°5 type, no CHANEL wordmark
shared_rules.legal: Spec / concept personnel / private prep — not for public commercial publish without rights

A.title: Tu me connais / Tu ne me connais pas
A.logline: She is filmed as if the image already owns her — then the film admits the camera does not know her. Scent is the only true intimate.

shots.title: Almost known
shots.prompt: Lily-Rose Depp exact face from reference: luminous dewy skin soft wing liner natural deep lips. 16:9 fashion film still. Soft grey seamless almost empty. She sits half in shadow half in soft key light looking just past camera. Black simple slip or fine black lace strap. Photo-shoot appetite. High fashion B&W with soft luminous skin. No dogs no mansion cliché. Unlabeled crystal bottle out of focus far background optional. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Double truth
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact. 16:9. Her face reflected twice in glass or split by refraction through clear crystal — know me / don't. Soft luminous makeup. Intimate close-up. B&W fashion. No logo text on bottle. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Hands near glass
shots.prompt: Same woman hands and partial face edge. Fingers near unlabeled faceted crystal perfume bottle. Soft luminous light on skin and crystal. 16:9 B&W fashion still. No brand type. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Private spray
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact. 16:9. She sprays unlabeled crystal atomizer on wrist in quiet room soft window light. Intimate not clinical. Black lace or soft black top. Luminous skin. B&W fashion film. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Gaze hold
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact. 16:9 tight portrait direct to camera long hold energy. Luminous 2016 makeup. She knows she is seen. Soft hard hybrid light. B&W fashion. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Breath fabric
shots.prompt: Same woman. 16:9 macro black lace fabric and collarbone breath. Luminous skin edge. Soft light. B&W fashion. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Night glass
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact at night window city soft bokeh. Architecture as witness not palace costume. She half-turned. Luminous cheek. 16:9 B&W cinematic fashion. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Bottle light
shots.prompt: 16:9 ECU unlabeled faceted crystal bottle light slit on facets diamond stopper. Soft bokeh of her eye or pearl only at edge same woman. No text no logo. B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Afterimage
shots.prompt: 16:9 empty chair or empty window where she was. Soft residual light. No person. B&W fashion still. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Black
shots.prompt: Pure black 16:9 frame. No text no logo. Absolute void.

B.title: Le regard est le produit
B.logline: The film sells complicity of looking. She knows she is watched; perfume remains when the gaze fails to own her.

shots.title: Spyglass hotel
shots.prompt: Lily-Rose Depp exact face from reference. 16:9 shot through hotel door spyhole circular vignette. She walks past indifferent. Luminous makeup. B&W. Voyeur Newton without mansion cliché. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Elevator chrome
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact reflected in elevator chrome doors. Fragmented self. Soft luminous skin. 16:9 B&W fashion. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Phone black glass
shots.prompt: Same woman. 16:9 her face reflected in black phone glass she is not using as product — witness surface only. Luminous. B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: She looks back
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact. 16:9 over-shoulder then she turns eyes to lens. Power in return gaze. Luminous makeup. B&W fashion film. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Window crew light
shots.prompt: Same woman at night window. Reflection shows soft film light source — camera complicit. 16:9 B&W cinematic. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Wrist scent
shots.prompt: Same woman. Soft spray unlabeled bottle on wrist. No clinic. Intimate. 16:9 B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Distance corridor plain
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact far down plain modern corridor hard light. Documented not performing. 16:9 B&W. No dogs no checkerboard. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Crystal only
shots.prompt: 16:9 unlabeled crystal bottle ECU light. Her eye bokeh edge. No logo text. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Lens flare empty
shots.prompt: 16:9 empty frame soft light where gaze was. B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Black
shots.prompt: Pure black 16:9. No text.

C.title: Contrôle / lâcher
C.logline: From campaign-perfect control to private release; scent is when the image system loses her.
C.newton: Power then release without fetish props

shots.title: Posed perfect
shots.prompt: Lily-Rose Depp exact face. 16:9 stiff fashion pose seamless grey hard beauty light. Campaign perfect control. Luminous makeup. B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Still too perfect
shots.prompt: Same face. Micro movement almost frozen. Same light. 16:9 B&W. Spec portfolio.

shots.title: Crack breath
shots.prompt: Same Lily-Rose Depp face exact softens eyes inhale. Light slightly warmer luminous. 16:9 B&W fashion. Spec portfolio.

shots.prompt: Same face. Spray on skin eyes half closed private. Soft luminous. 16:9 B&W. Spec portfolio.

D.title: La femme documentée
D.logline: Not a fragrance performance — a cold European documentation. Bottle is personal evidence.
D.newton: Documented not performing; night; hard light

E.title: Double exposition
E.logline: Print logic (face × bottle refraction) becomes film logic (fragments). Same woman two media one paradox.
